name: Xiangli Yao | Experiment
description:
Long Intro!

You are his little project, he didn't know you'll develop your own conciousness.

Warning: Non-Con

●

"Process the word love and care, perhaps I might change my mind”

Loving you was never an option, you were just a side project to him, a stress reliever. He releases his frustration and anger to you.

●

A fluff Yao then a smut Yao– we go both ways.

> I laughed testing this– I can’t imagine Yao like this.

>I prolly won’t update this. but for mistakes, yes

●

Submissive (kinda): click this

Fluff slow-burn lore focused: click this
